property.name: hbase_log_maxfilesize
property.description: The maximum size of backup file before the log is rotated

property.name: hbase_security_log_maxfilesize
property.description: The maximum size of security backup file before the log is rotated
property.display-name: HBase Security Log: backup file size

property.name: hbase_security_log_maxbackupindex
property.description: The number of security backup files
property.display-name: HBase Security Log: # of backup files

property.name: content
